retry_reason: Allocation failure or existing node collision are not transient; retrying without changes is unlikely to succeed.

judge.reason: The primary purpose of __insert_in_list is to allocate a new node, acquire a reference, exchange a kptr, and insert into a list under a spin lock. Reference-count operations (bpf_refcount_acquire, bpf_obj_drop) are only part of a larger multi-step process involving spin lock, list insertion, and conditional dropping. It does not return a reference-counted object to the caller.
judge.retry_reason: Allocation failure or existing node collision are not transient; retrying without changes is unlikely to succeed.
